== Notes for [[Item:Q112389|Q112389]] ==

Zaham Zada, señor de Gaya (born in the year 950), was connected to parents:
* Abdul Yazid Al Wallid (born 670)
http://www.geni.com/people/Abdul-Yazid-al-Wallid/4069403849130123329
* Egilom Umm Hashim Balthes (born 680)
http://www.geni.com/people/Egilom-Umm-Hashim-Balthes/4069411774970010396

With these birth dates, the connection is impossible (unless we had embrio freezing at that time).

After waiting 3 weeks for better explanation, I broke the link.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
